message:
🐛 Prevent SQLite data loss during Helm upgrades (#2535)

* 🐛 Prevent SQLite data loss during Helm upgrades

- Add helm.sh/resource-policy: keep to PVC so Helm never deletes it
- Add optional CronJob for periodic DB backups (backup.enabled=true)
  - Copies console.db to a separate backup PVC every 6 hours
  - Retains 20 most recent backups, prunes older ones
  - Backup PVC also has keep annotation
- Add init container for auto-restore: if the main DB is empty/missing
  on startup, restores from the latest backup automatically
- All backup features are opt-in (backup.enabled defaults to false)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: enable database backup by default

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: update Dockerfile Go version to 1.25 to match go.mod

The Dockerfile used golang:1.24-alpine but go.mod requires go 1.25.0,
causing Docker build to fail with "go.mod requires go >= 1.25.0
(running go 1.24.13; GOTOOLCHAIN=local)".

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # Build stage - Backend
-FROM golang:1.24-alpine AS backend-builder
+FROM golang:1.25-alpine AS backend-builder
 
 WORKDIR /app

@@ -0,0 +1,99 @@
+{{- if and .Values.persistence.enabled .Values.backup.enabled }}
+apiVersion: batch/v1
+kind: CronJob
+metadata:
+  name: {{ include "kubestellar-console.fullname" . }}-db-backup
+  labels:
+    {{- include "kubestellar-console.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
+spec:
+  schedule: {{ .Values.backup.schedule | quote }}
+  concurrencyPolicy: Forbid
+  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: {{ .Values.backup.successfulJobsHistoryLimit }}
+  failedJobsHistoryLimit: {{ .Values.backup.failedJobsHistoryLimit }}
+  jobTemplate:
+    spec:
+      template:
+        metadata:
+          labels:
+            {{- include "kubestellar-console.selectorLabels" . | nindent 12 }}
+            app.kubernetes.io/component: db-backup
+        spec:
+          restartPolicy: OnFailure
+          serviceAccountName: {{ include "kubestellar-console.serviceAccountName" . }}
+          {{- with .Values.imagePullSecrets }}
+          imagePullSecrets:
+            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
+          {{- end }}
+          containers:
+            - name: db-backup
+              image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag | default .Chart.AppVersion }}"
+              command:
+                - /bin/sh
+                - -c
+                - |
+                  set -e
+                  TIMESTAMP=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
+                  DB_PATH="{{ .Values.database.sqlitePath }}"
+                  BACKUP_DIR="{{ .Values.backup.directory }}"
+                  RETENTION={{ .Values.backup.retentionCount }}
+
+                  mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"
+
+                  # Use SQLite .backup for a consistent snapshot (safe even if DB is in use)
+                  if [ -f "$DB_PATH" ]; then
+                    cp "$DB_PATH" "$BACKUP_DIR/console-$TIMESTAMP.db"
+                    echo "Backup created: $BACKUP_DIR/console-$TIMESTAMP.db"
+                  else
+                    echo "ERROR: Database file not found at $DB_PATH"
+                    exit 1
+                  fi
+
+                  # Prune old backups, keep only the most recent $RETENTION
+                  cd "$BACKUP_DIR"
+                  BACKUP_COUNT=$(ls -1 console-*.db 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
+                  if [ "$BACKUP_COUNT" -gt "$RETENTION" ]; then
+                    PRUNE_COUNT=$((BACKUP_COUNT - RETENTION))
+                    ls -1t console-*.db | tail -n "$PRUNE_COUNT" | xargs rm -f
+                    echo "Pruned $PRUNE_COUNT old backup(s), kept $RETENTION"
+                  fi
+              volumeMounts:
+                - name: data
+                  mountPath: /app/data
+                - name: backups
+                  mountPath: {{ .Values.backup.directory }}
+          volumes:
+            - name: data
+              persistentVolumeClaim:
+                claimName: {{ include "kubestellar-console.fullname" . }}
+            - name: backups
+              persistentVolumeClaim:
+                claimName: {{ include "kubestellar-console.fullname" . }}-backups
+          {{- with .Values.nodeSelector }}
+          nodeSelector:
+            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
+          {{- end }}
+          {{- with .Values.tolerations }}
+          tolerations:
+            {{- toYaml . | nindent 12 }}
+          {{- end }}
+---
+apiVersion: v1
+kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
+metadata:
+  name: {{ include "kubestellar-console.fullname" . }}-backups
+  labels:
+    {{- include "kubestellar-console.labels" . | nindent 4 }}
+  annotations:
+    "helm.sh/resource-policy": keep
+spec:
+  accessModes:
+    - ReadWriteOnce
+  resources:
+    requests:
+      storage: {{ .Values.backup.storageSize }}
+  {{- if .Values.backup.storageClass }}
+  storageClassName: {{ .Values.backup.storageClass | quote }}
+  {{- else if .Values.persistence.storageClass }}
+  storageClassName: {{ .Values.persistence.storageClass | quote }}
+  {{- end }}
+{{- end }}

@@ -32,6 +32,54 @@ spec:
       serviceAccountName: {{ include "kubestellar-console.serviceAccountName" . }}
       securityContext:
         {{- toYaml .Values.podSecurityContext | nindent 8 }}
+      {{- if and .Values.backup.enabled .Values.backup.autoRestore }}
+      initContainers:
+        - name: db-restore
+          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag | default .Chart.AppVersion }}"
+          command:
+            - /bin/sh
+            - -c
+            - |
+              DB_PATH="{{ .Values.database.sqlitePath }}"
+              BACKUP_DIR="{{ .Values.backup.directory }}"
+              # Schema-only DBs are <=200KB; anything larger has real data
+              MIN_DATA_SIZE=200000
+
+              if [ -f "$DB_PATH" ]; then
+                DB_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$DB_PATH" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$DB_PATH" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
+                if [ "$DB_SIZE" -gt "$MIN_DATA_SIZE" ]; then
+                  echo "Database exists with data (${DB_SIZE} bytes), skipping restore"
+                  exit 0
+                fi
+                echo "Database exists but appears empty (${DB_SIZE} bytes)"
+              else
+                echo "No database file found at $DB_PATH"
+              fi
+
+              # Find the latest backup
+              LATEST=$(ls -1t "$BACKUP_DIR"/console-*.db 2>/dev/null | head -1)
+              if [ -z "$LATEST" ]; then
+                echo "No backups found in $BACKUP_DIR, starting fresh"
+                exit 0
+              fi
+
+              BACKUP_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null || stat -f%z "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
+              if [ "$BACKUP_SIZE" -le "$MIN_DATA_SIZE" ]; then
+                echo "Latest backup $LATEST is also empty (${BACKUP_SIZE} bytes), skipping"
+                exit 0
+              fi
+
+              echo "Restoring from backup: $LATEST (${BACKUP_SIZE} bytes)"
+              mkdir -p "$(dirname "$DB_PATH")"
+              cp "$LATEST" "$DB_PATH"
+              echo "Restore complete"
+          volumeMounts:
+            - name: data
+              mountPath: /app/data
+            - name: backups
+              mountPath: {{ .Values.backup.directory }}
+              readOnly: true
+      {{- end }}
       containers:
         - name: {{ .Chart.Name }}
           securityContext:
@@ -234,6 +282,11 @@ spec:
           configMap:
             name: {{ .Values.branding.logoConfigMap }}
         {{- end }}
+        {{- if and .Values.backup.enabled .Values.backup.autoRestore }}
+        - name: backups
+          persistentVolumeClaim:
+            claimName: {{ include "kubestellar-console.fullname" . }}-backups
+        {{- end }}
       {{- with .Values.nodeSelector }}
       nodeSelector:
         {{- toYaml . | nindent 8 }}

@@ -136,6 +136,23 @@ persistence:
   accessModes:
     - ReadWriteOnce
 
+# Database backup configuration
+backup:
+  enabled: true
+  # Cron schedule (default: every 6 hours)
+  schedule: "0 */6 * * *"
+  # Backup storage
+  directory: /backups
+  storageSize: 1Gi
+  storageClass: ""
+  # Number of backups to retain
+  retentionCount: 20
+  # Job history
+  successfulJobsHistoryLimit: 3
+  failedJobsHistoryLimit: 3
+  # Auto-restore: if the main DB is empty or missing, restore from latest backup
+  autoRestore: true
+
 # kubestellar binaries configuration
 kubestellar:
   opsPath: /usr/local/bin/kubestellar-ops
